description: Deterministic benchmark over the complete repository sample_data corpus. It parses real files, builds an offline retrieval baseline, validates expected QA evidence, source citations, grounded answer claims, no-answer controls, entity recall, numeric and tabular logic, compliance gaps, contradiction pairs, RCA evidence, graph links, graph validation, parser coverage, source coverage, and latency without calling an LLM or mutating the database.
